claims.falsification: schemas/theorem-archived-blob-statement-replay-pass-0040.json is missing, has a different schema, status, theorem_count, archive_check_count, unique_archive_file_count, SHA-256, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0040 created a TheoremArchivedBlobStatementReplaySet/v1 artifact with status ARCHIVED_BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH, theorem_count 10, archive_check_count 10, unique_archive_file_count 10, sha256 e45620662cc30976f8b1f814e5b0ceb3815c16f6e86e091364220fa286bfe654, and seal c38574335633bb119b7c14b8f7a69db44751f04f44bb3fd74c71df4e2a74818d.

claims.falsification: the archived blob statement replay fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0040 records fixture fixtures/theorem-archived-blob-statement-replay-pass-0040.json with sha256 cc76916c782838deda0c4c19b5324279e0a3524497d3b75728459e9cedeea1f7 and seal e81a919446ab3e8184ad74cc444a8cbe628490c51a83d41edccb261a021c3a95.

claims.falsification: the pass 0039 binding is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or does not report the expected source status
claims.text: Pass 0040 binds to pass 0039 remote raw-blob statement replay with sha256 0e13f8c76728c20d3cfdb298638da8c5054f9b2bdf4e6fd8db0f74065fb20376, seal c01eb59d75eb418f551e302b19dbaf47c4193373f72c4af5d229567fa96ebc58, and source status REMOTE_BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH.

claims.falsification: any of the ten archive statement checks has archive_frozen_solution_status, archive_frozen_proof_status, archive_discharge_status, or archive_signature_status other than MATCH
claims.text: Pass 0040 records all ten theorem archive statement checks with archive frozen-solution, frozen-proof, discharge-gate, and overall signature statuses MATCH.

claims.falsification: any unique archive file is missing, has an archive SHA-256 differing from pass 0039 remote raw SHA-256, or requires remote access for replay
claims.text: Pass 0040 records all ten unique archive files under archives/pass-0040-remote-blobs/sha256 with archive SHA-256 matching pass 0039 remote raw bytes and external_call_required_for_replay false.

claims.falsification: the pass 0040 validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, or has different theorem_count, archive_check_count, or unique_archive_file_count
claims.text: Pass 0040 validator result reports MATCH with theorem_count 10, archive_check_count 10, and unique_archive_file_count 10 using local archive files.

claims.falsification: packet 050 or the pass 0040 steelman is missing or has a different SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0040 records packet 050 with sha256 4cb465d14bc4672b67ecaec6827f6bf0d2fabab1b4a36bd93fa18adf35f27ef9 and local steelman with sha256 e0f96bce831a6f06a6e07f61e1361e430db31d61345d66557eada0fefc8c0f4f.

claims.falsification: pass 0040 artifacts claim Lean replay, semantic proof review, axiom-free proof, validation of every public pipeline-math claim, or a promoted natural law
claims.text: Pass 0040 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it checks archived raw-source replay by digest only, does not re-run Lean, does not claim semantic proof review, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0040 Content-Addressed Archive Statement Replay
